fault_hypothesis: On line 59, the mean is computed by dividing total by `window` instead of `len(recent)`. When fewer values exist than the window size, this produces an incorrect (too small) average.

constraints.intent: After computing mean, it must equal total divided by the actual number of recent samples, not by window.
mean times the count of recent samples must equal total; dividing by window violates this when len(recent) < window.
Immediately before mean is used in the return, verify it was computed with the correct denominator.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - sum(values[-window:]) / len(values[-window:])) < 1e-6

constraints.intent: The returned value must match the mean of the actual recent samples, not total divided by window.
